valuesr
Program._disassemblec
		>>> p = Program()
		>>> bool(p)
		False
		>>> bc = array.array("B", [0])
		>>> p.fromBytecode(bc)
		>>> bool(p)
		True
		>>> p.bytecode.pop()
		>>> bool(p)
		False
		>>> p = Program()
		>>> asm = ['SVTCA[0]']
		>>> p.fromAssembly(asm)
		>>> bool(p)
		True
		>>> p.assembly.pop()
		'SVTCA[0]'
		>>> bool(p)
		False
